tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(def open-big-prs
  (filter
    (fn [pr] (and (= (:state pr) "open")
                  (> (:additions pr) 400)
                  (or (nil? (:closes_linear pr))
                      (= (:closes_linear pr) ""))))
    (github_pull_requests)))

(def by-repo (frequencies (map :repo open-big-prs)))
(def total (count open-big-prs))
(def top-pr (apply max-key :additions open-big-pr…(+221)
